  • Constructor Details

    • Log

      public Log(String action, String description)
      Creates one audit log line payload.
      Parameters:
      action - action label for the log line.
      description - target or description label for the log line.

  • Method Details

    • setLoggedInUser

      public static void setLoggedInUser(String username)
      Sets the in-memory username used for later log lines when staff sign in.
      Parameters:
      username - staff username

    • clearLoggedInUser

      public static void clearLoggedInUser()
      Clears the in-memory username when staff sign out.

    • getCurrentDate

      public String getCurrentDate()
      Returns:
      formatted current date value.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      user label value.

      Parameters:
      user - user label value.

      Returns:

      Parameters:

      Returns:
